name: linum usitatissimum
title: best benefits of linum usitatissimum
description: Linum usitatissimum improves bone health by increasing bone mineral density, reducing the risk of osteoporosis and fractures. This benefit is crucial as it can prevent age-related bone loss, reducing the risk of osteoporosis-related fractures, which can lead to disability and mortality.
